query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `comments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `entityType` enum('parcel','transaction') NOT NULL,
  `entityId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `comments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `comments_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `activity_logs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `metadata` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `activity_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `activity_logs_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `saved_searches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `query` json NOT NULL,
  `isFavorite` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `saved_searches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `saved_searches_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
